title: Controllers + wiring (highest-risk L5)
gates_pending: Phase 12 UI wires these controllers to screens
Phase 14 scenario tests exercise cross-controller flows
next_action: Phase 12 — UI screens + theme + core widgets. Groups A-F sequenced to respect L5 single-owner on hot files. Trigger language agents (Phase 13) whenever app_en.arb grows.
notes: SettingsController uses await-load pattern (D-CONTROLLER-1) — mutators await _loadComplete before reading state. DistressChainsController enforces non-empty invariant. Battery-alert path structurally yields to user session. API notes: save() replaces update() on async notifiers due to Riverpod 3 method collision.
